warnings: Minnesota AGE Public Data Access is the preferred statewide approved-license source, but the portal is currently blocking headless automation. This build is currently automating Minneapolis, St. Paul, Fargo, and Sioux Falls public records instead.
Rapid City agenda pages are still behind a Cloudflare challenge, so Rapid City remains a manual watchlist source for now.
Apify enrichment is active via project-dotenv.
Filtered 28 temporary or consumption-only permits from the main board because they are not durable distributor opportunities.
